title: [CI:DOCS] Disable dependabot in favor of renovate
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Both tools were enabled during a transition period.  While Dependabot has a repository setting, it will re-enable itself if a config. file exists in the repo.  Remove the config file so it can be fully disabled.

#### How to verify it

Dependabot will stop opening new PRs.  It will likely abandon any that are already open.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #4588

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

I've already disabled Dependabot in the repo. settings.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
